title: Communauté de communes Arnon Boischaut Cher
summary: The Communauté de communes Arnon Boischaut Cher is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure, in the Cher department, in the Centre-Val de Loire region, central France. It was created in January 2011 by the merger of the former communautés de communes Portes du Boischaut and Rives du Cher. Its area is 379.5 km2, and its population was 8,109 in 2018. Its seat is in Châteauneuf-sur-Cher.
text:
The Communauté de communes Arnon Boischaut Cher is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure, in the Cher department, in the Centre-Val de Loire region, central France. It was created in January 2011 by the merger of the former communautés de communes Portes du Boischaut and Rives du Cher. Its area is 379.5 km2, and its population was 8,109 in 2018. Its seat is in Châteauneuf-sur-Cher.
